title: dash sword
description: adds new swords adds various crafts
body:
D![Dash Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36fcef11903c16eacb8590597421b46f9ddeef81.png)

This mod features unique weapons, as well as unique crafts, for example, 

In a workbench you can make a golden apple and a golden enchanted apple, you can make a bedrock, as well as unique swords, for example,

Olympus has buffs applied to get this sword, you will have to sweat a lot, since in order to get the currency of the ancient gods you must bargain with a resident librarian, to get the 

Demon sword you need a magma clot, lava and golden apples, also in the mod there is an energy sword, to get it you need to find and smelt ore.
